yeast-bread-lezzet.name: Yeast Bread
instructions: 1. First, let the yeast mix with warm water and sugar and wait for 10 minutes to dissolve.
2. Add flour and salt into the kneading container from the island and open the pit to the middle.
3. Add a mixture of yeast that dissolves into the pit.
4. knead all materials until they get a soft consistency.
5. Wait for 40 minutes to swim over the dough with moist cloth.
6. After slightly weting your hand, cut the flour of the countertop and bread dough into 7-8 cloth.
7. The shape of bread with your hands of each cloth and the oily paper is indexed to the baking tray.
8. Keep the oven for 20 minutes before jumping.
9. Then take deep scratches with the opposite of the blade.
10. Finally, rub yogurt on bread and cook for 25 minutes in the oven with pre-heated 220 degrees.
11. 11. Spray pointFelt your hand and knife slightly to ensure the adhesion of the dough and comfortable shape.
12. It is necessary to pay attention that the ambient heat is high when waiting for the dough yeast process.
12. August The process of yeast in hot environments is faster.
14 July You can find homemade bread recipes here.
15. Do not forget to browse the full wheat flour bread recipe with Black Sea.

yogurt-sweet-from-argyro-argiro.name: Yogurt Sweet From Argyro

ingredients.item: 2 cookies of your liking simple or stuffed
2 cookies of your liking simple or stuffed

instructions: Beat the cold cream in thick form with wire or hand mixer.
Add the yogurt, milk caramel, 1 pinch of salt and gently mix with spatula.
Break the cookies into pieces small inside.
Gently mix to get wet.
We'll use a pickle, a detachable base or a fireproof vessel.
Touch the zirconia ring on a tray or platter.
Empty the sweet and press with the spoon without any gaps.
We're straightening the surface.
Refrigerate for 10 minutes or in the refrigerator for longer and prepare the strawberry jelly.
Put the red fruits on the surface of the cake and pour with the jelly.
Refrigerate for a few hours.
We're getting rid of the pickle.
Cut into pieces and serve.

yogurt-sweet-with-peach-jelly-argiro.name: Yogurt Sweet With Peach Jelly
instructions: Place the peach compost in a colander and let it drain completely.
Cut four peaches into slices and chop the rest.
Boil 700 ml of water and add the peach jelly into a large bowl and pour it with the boiling water stirring to melt completely.
Add the juice from the compost and mix well.
Finally, pour six ice cubes into the mixture and let them melt.
Mix and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Then gradually incorporate the yoghurt into the Jell-O by whisking it to be completely homogenized.
Add the chopped peaches and mix.
Transfer the cake into a refractory vessel and freeze it to the refrigerator for about 4 hours until it is fully stabilised to cut.
Garnish with peach slices, cut into pieces and serve.
